message.example: User does not belong to this tenant
API key not found or already revoked

apiKey.description: Raw key shown once at creation. Store it securely.

post.summary: Create Razorpay order for plan subscription
post.description: Creates a subscription intent/order. Requires tenant context and owner/admin membership role.

parameters.name: x-tenant-id
parameters.description: Tenant ObjectId. Optional when access token already contains activeTenantId, required otherwise.

200.description: Subscription initiated and Razorpay order created

400.description: Validation failure, basic-plan subscribe, or active subscription edge case

value.message: Tenant already has an active subscription
Basic plan cannot be subscribed in this manner

403.description: Forbidden for non owner/admin or tenant membership mismatch

post.summary: Verify payment and activate tenant subscription

parameters.name: x-tenant-id
parameters.description: Tenant ObjectId. Optional when access token already contains activeTenantId, required otherwise.

400.description: Validation failure, bad signature, or invalid subscription state

value.message: Subscription is not in created state

post.description: Public endpoint for payment events. Signature validation is mandatory via x-razorpay-signature header.
